_comment: Community-driven trait rankings. Keyed by learned_id or 'name:XYZ' for traits without learned_id. Tier: S/A/B/F. Unranked = C. Source: docs/TRAITS-COMMUNITY.md

160081.note: Getting Braver (Claw exclusive) — stacking crit/speed per melee hit, up to 5x

160611.note: Steel Body — immune to stagger when tenacity above 50%

160131.note: Firm Will (Flint exclusive) — 25% chance to resist stagger

160111.note: Crave for Blood — 25% chance to heal 30% of damage dealt

170521.note: Chain Dodge — immune to next hit after dodge

name:Weapon Master.note: Weapon Master (title) — +10% all weapon damage, +10% ATK speed, universally #1 combat trait

name:Experience - Battle-tested.note: Experience - Battle-tested — -50/60% damage taken as companion follower

160461.note: Bloodbath Recovery — 20% chance when hit to regen HP for 15s

160351.note: Tactical Dodge — +30% move speed, +10% ATK, +30% ATK speed for 5s after dodge

160011.note: Last Radiance — recover 20% HP in 5s when below 30%

160521.note: Insight DEF (Flint exclusive) — ignore defense for 7s after parry

150071.note: Extraordinary Talent — +20% trigger chance for all proc-based traits (additive)

160021.note: Wild Nature Awakened — +20% ATK, +20 STA/s below 30% HP, but -20% DEF

160531.note: Wrath of Revenge — massive stat boost for 20s when ally dies within 10m

150091.note: Rapid Fire (Hunter exclusive) — bow full-charge time -55%

160431.note: Blood Absorption — steal HP on hit, enhanced vs bleeding targets

170061.note: Resilient Healing — constant HP regen above 70% HP

160581.note: Fatal Rhythm (Claw exclusive) — stacking ATK/speed when stamina above 70%

160651.note: Morale Dampener (Claw exclusive) — debuff enemy ATK/DEF/speed on hit

160331.note: Dodge and Strike — +30% move speed, +10% ATK, +30% ATK speed for 5s after dodge

100091.note: Unnoticeable — -60% vigilance, must-have for stealth builds

160641.note: PEN DEF — penetration defense, highly valued in player builds

160551.note: Merciless Means — debuff enemies on kill

160561.note: Slaughter Fervency — stacking buffs on kills

160541.note: Enemy Down Fervency — damage immunity charge on nearby enemy death

130101.note: Hardened Skin - Anti-Blunt Strike — -20% blunt damage

160601.note: Avoid Vitals (Flint exclusive) — 80% ranged damage mitigation

160291.note: Endurance — +80% DEF for 6s, +30 resilience on block (20s CD)

160501.note: Endurance Burst (Flint exclusive) — stacking DEF on block, +100% damage burst at 6 stacks, no cooldown

160061.note: Acceleration at Stress — 20% chance for +30% move speed when attacked

160281.note: Loaded Raid — +40% move speed at 90%+ encumbrance

170081.note: Embers — survive 9 extra lethal hits in 12s

160121.note: Surprise Attack — 20% chance any hit treated as weak point

160051.note: Fatal — bonus damage + bleed on low-HP targets

160341.note: Extreme Dodge — recover 35 stamina after dodge

160151.note: Hardened Body — 20% chance to gain super armor when staggered

160381.note: Static Recovery — regen HP while standing still; works in down state and while shield-blocking

150081.note: Marksman Footstep (Hunter exclusive) — +95% move speed while aiming bow, 10s duration, no CD

170191.note: Damage Boost Blessing — next 10 weapon hits lock at highest recent damage for 12s; listed in community endgame warrior builds

170181.note: Courageous Current — 15% on hit to reset ALL talent cooldowns (30s CD); doubles uptime of cooldown-gated S/A traits

170001.note: Breezy Downpour — -30% move speed permanently, +30% ATK speed; downside irrelevant for AI followers who teleport

160941.note: Stimulate Morale (Flint exclusive) — 20% when attacked: all proc-based talents guaranteed for 10s (25s CD); tank version of Mind-Heart Unison

170171.note: Rampage — when Ignited/Poisoned/Bleeding: 15s of +20% ATK speed, +20% move speed, 20% lifesteal, slow immunity

160931.note: Strikeback (Fang exclusive) — dodge 2 attacks within 6s: ignore enemy defense for 7s; Fang's version of Insight DEF

160901.note: Tit for Tat (Claw exclusive) — 20% when attacked: store all damage for 8s, then deal it all back (30s CD)

160631.note: Mind-Heart Unison — enter flow state on hit, all traits guaranteed to proc for 10s

160471.note: Lose-lose — weak point trade-off, +60% both ways

160301.note: Defense to Offense — return 50% of parried damage

160481.note: Overwhelming Force — spend 15 STA for +15% damage per hit

160961.note: Crisis Resolution — 15% chance to cap hit at 3% max HP

170131.note: Life Shackles — 15% when attacked: lose HP recovery for 25s but damage per hit capped at 2% max HP; extreme mitigation

170611.note: Bloodline Suppression — 25% when attacked: cap enemy single-hit damage at 300 for 10s

170841.note: Intimidating Strike — 15% on melee hit: cap target single-hit damage at 300 for 6s (15s CD)

120011.note: Blood Activating — +200% HP recovery speed (passive); amplifies all other healing traits

120021.note: Full Stamina — +50% stamina recovery per tick (passive); strong combat sustain

100041.note: Enhance DEF — +9% DEF; same tier structure as Fierce Attack / Powerful Attack

170531.note: Limb Shatter — 25% after dodge: next attack +100% Crit and random CC for 6s (12s CD)

170471.note: Superarmor Break — 40% on reflect: remove Superarmor and prevent it for 3s; high value in boss fights

170391.note: Defensive Attack — after blocking: ignore enemy defense for 3s (20s CD); non-exclusive Insight DEF variant

160691.note: Onslaught (Warrior exclusive) — depleting resilience removes Superarmor, +10% ATK speed 12s, stamina regen on high hits

150021.note: Multiple Shooting (Hunter exclusive) — shoots multiple arrows per skill use; core for archer builds

160671.note: Malice — 15% vs poisoned/burning/bleeding targets: +3% Crit, +4% Crit DMG per stack (5 max); strong in DOT teams

160621.note: Poisoned Body (Fang exclusive) — 15% per attack: stack poison DOT + stamina drain, up to 5 stacks; core Fang identity

160921.note: Pouring Rage (Fang exclusive) — 20% to store all damage taken for 8s, then deal it all to enemies (30s CD)

160951.note: Desperate Response (Fang exclusive) — below 30% HP: cap damage per hit at 3% max HP; passive, no cooldown

160241.note: Weak Spot Enhance — weak spot damage taken -60%; significant defensive passive

170261.note: Crit Steal — 15% to steal 5% Crit + 10% Crit DMG, stacks 5x; double benefit of weakening + buffing

170711.note: Attack Speed Steal (Wildwolf exclusive) — 15% to steal 5% ATK speed, stacks 5x; Wildwolf signature combat trait

170581.note: Spirit of the Pack (Wildwolf exclusive) — +4% damage per nearby ally (5 max), +8% if Wildwolf; up to 40% in squads

170591.note: Savagehorn Soul (Savagehorn exclusive) — +4% damage reduction per nearby ally (5 max), +8% if Savagehorn

name_zh:无畏者.note: The Dauntless (title) — stun immune at cost of no dodge; insane on follower companions since NPCs rarely dodge anyway

name_zh:部落·毒免炎热抗性.note: Tribe born: poison immunity + heat resist combo

name_zh:部落·暴击之力.note: Power of Crit — +8% crit rate, great tribe born stat

name_zh:部落·抵御之力.note: Power of Resistance — defensive tribe born, scales well into end game

name_zh:部落·坚韧之力.note: Power of Tenacity — +25 max tenacity, strong defensive tribe born

name_zh:部落·荒狼之力.note: Wildwolf Power — % damage add (Shifting Sands), preferred over Savagehorn for offense

name_zh:部落·蛮角之力.note: Savagehorn Power — % damage reduction (Shifting Sands), solid defensive pick

name_zh:部落·毒素抵抗.note: Poison Resist — better early game, not worth worrying over vs other tribe born options

name_zh:部落·毒素免疫.note: Poison Immunity — better late game when stacking 100% poison proof via gear, still niche

name_zh:厌恶群居.note: Dislikes Communal Living — constant mood penalty in any tribe with 10+ people, always triggered

name_zh:厌恶晴天.note: Dislikes Sunny Days — constant mood drain on clear weather, always triggered

171001.note: Skillful Hand (Wolf exclusive) — 10% chance for extra weapon properties

171011.note: Masterwork Armor (Horn exclusive) — 10% chance for extra armor properties

160811.note: Crafting Speed Up (Artisan exclusive) — -30% craft time

160821.note: Accelerate Weapon Crafting (Artisan exclusive) — -30% weapon craft time

160831.note: Accelerate Armor Crafting (Artisan exclusive) — -30% armor craft time

160741.note: Accelerate Wood & Stone (Laborer exclusive) — -30% woodwork time

name:Slow Growth.note: Universally terrible — -20/60% XP gain, dramatically slows leveling

name:Born with Bad Luck.note: Universally terrible — -10/20/30% trigger chance for ALL other positive traits

name:Attack Weakening.note: Universally terrible — -3/6/9% ATK, direct combat nerf
